strengths: Roughly 19 years of continuous hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current work at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and frameworks supporting agentic workflows
Demonstrated initiative through founding the open-source GISCollective platform and delivering conference talks and multi-day workshops
concerns: AI exposure is shallow and recent — roughly one year of tooling work with no advanced AI degree, no ML background, and no recognized AI products or platforms, against a role demanding recognized AI expertise
Career has plateaued at Senior/Staff level in small companies; no evidence of director-level scope, organization-wide technical strategy, or advising strategic customers and partners

Entrepreneurial experience is a part-time open-source side project rather than intrapreneurship within larger organizations, and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deploys) is incidental implementation work, not platform strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and credentials
No director-level or strategic leadership track record

response.justification: The candidate is a capable, versatile senior implementer, but this role is a director-level AI strategy position and the gap is substantial. Their AI involvement amounts to about a year of agent-tooling work with no formal AI education, no published AI research, and no shipped AI products of recognized standing — falling far short of 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms.' Nearly two decades of experience never progressed beyond Senior/Staff roles at small firms, offering no evidence of the executive-facing advisory, cross-organizational influence, or strategic vision-setting the position requires. Deep specialization in the niche D language and small-scale product work does not translate to cloud/AI platform strategy at scale, making this candidate a weak fit for a Principal Engineer role centered on AI strategy.
